document.title: Clinical Evaluation Plan / Clinical Evaluation Report

sourceSummary.oneLine: Controlled clinical evaluation plan and report forms revised on 2024.04.01 in accordance with KGMP, ISO 13485, FDA 21 CFR Part 820, and MDR Article 10 requirements.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used as controlled forms for clinical evaluation planning and reporting under the referenced quality and regulatory requirements.
keyPoints: Clinical Evaluation Plan has Document No 706-1, Rev. No 0, revision date 2024.04.01, and controlled status.
Clinical Evaluation Report has Document No 706-2, Rev. No 0, revision date 2024.04.01, and controlled status.
Revision history states complete revision in accordance with KGMP, ISO 13485:2016, EN ISO 13485:2016+A11:2021, FDA 21 CFR Part 820, and MDR (EU) 2017/745 Article 10 requirements.

entities.evidence: Complete revision in accordance with KGMP, ISO 13485:2016 (EN ISO 13485:2016+A11:2021), FDA 21 CFR Part 820, and MDR (EU) 2017/745 Article 10 requirements.

entities.evidence: Complete revision in accordance with KGMP, ISO 13485:2016 (EN ISO 13413485:2016+A11:2021), FDA 21 CFR Part 820, and MDR (EU) 2017/745 Article 10 requirements.

concepts.evidence: Complete revision in accordance with KGMP, ISO 13485:2016 (EN ISO 13485:2016+A11:2021), FDA 21 CFR Part 820, and MDR (EU) 2017/745 Article 10 requirements.

evidence.claim: The Clinical Evaluation Plan form is Document No 706-1.
The Clinical Evaluation Plan form is Rev. No 0 and dated 2024.04.01.

The Clinical Evaluation Report form is Document No 706-2.
The Clinical Evaluation Report form is Rev. No 0 and dated 2024.04.01.
The Clinical Evaluation Report form is controlled.
The revision history records a complete revision in accordance with KGMP, ISO 13485:2016, EN ISO 13485:2016+A11:2021, FDA 21 CFR Part 820, and MDR (EU) 2017/745 Article 10 requirements.
